title: Sales Engineer (Power Supply & Semi-Con)
description:
A. Sales Engineer (Electrical & Semi-conductor Sector)

Responsibilities:

  • Drive sales performance to achieve sales target (AOP) across assigned and new accounts, solutions, products ( ie. electronics assembly products ) and services
  • Manage and work closely with stakeholders in assigned countries to achieve sales growth, market share and margins.
  • Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer requirements to develop effective sales strategies.
  • Work closely with relevant stakeholders (ie. customers, principals, vendors, etc.) to enhance customer experience and optimize sales efforts.
  • Conduct evaluation for system, parts and materials with customers
  • Possess drive, initiative and attention to detail in ensuring all sales opportunities are captured.
  • Ensure the consistent implementation of company strategies, policies, tools, and processes at the local level in alignment with global standards.
  • Contribute to building the company’s market awareness and leadership position through customer-centric and strategic engagement.

Requirements:

  • Degree / Diploma in Engineering (Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics)
  • Minimum 2 years technical sales experience, preferably capital equipment sales to Electronics and Semiconductor industries
  • Possess good presentation, negotiation, planning and coordination skills
  • Possess a valid class 3 license with own vehicle
  • Ability to work independently under minimum supervision and in a team environment

Location: Tradehub 21 (5 days work week)

B. Sales Engineer at Toa Payoh Area ($4k to $6.5k)

1. Sales & Business Development

  • Promote and sell Switch Mode Power Supplies, AC Sources, DC Programmable Power Supplies, and related solutions.
  • Identify and develop new customers in industries such as electronics manufacturing, R&D labs, automation, EV, renewable energy, and testing facilities.
  • Manage and grow existing customer accounts to achieve sales targets.
  • Prepare quotations, negotiate pricing, and close sales deals.

2. Technical Support (Pre‑Sales)

  • Understand customer applications and technical requirements.
  • Recommend suitable products and configurations based on specifications (voltage, current, power rating, load type, etc.).
  • Conduct product demonstrations, presentations, and technical discussions.
  • Support customers with product selection, system integration, and application guidance.

3. Customer Relationship Management

  • Build long‑term relationships with customers, system integrators, and distributors.
  • Act as the main technical and commercial contact point for customers.
  • Handle customer inquiries, RFQs, and tenders efficiently.

4. After‑Sales & Coordination

  • Coordinate with internal teams (engineering, production, service) to ensure smooth order fulfilment.
  • Assist customers with basic troubleshooting and liaise with service teams when necessary.
  • Gather customer feedback and market information for continuous product improvement.

5. Market & Product Intelligence

  • Monitor market trends, competitors, and pricing.
  • Provide feedback on customer needs and market demand to product management.
  • Participate in trade shows, exhibitions, and technical seminars when required.

Job Requirements

  1. Education
  • Diploma / Bachelor's Degree in Electrical & Electronic Engineering, Power Electronics, or a related field.
  • Experience: Min. 2 years of experience in technical sales, application engineering, or sales engineering.
  • Experience with power supplies, test & measurement equipment, industrial electronics, or similar products is an advantage.
  • Must have basic understanding of Power electronics and electrical specifications, AC/DC power systems, AC sources, DC programmable power supplies (preferred)

Ability to read datasheets, block diagrams, and basic electrical schematics.


HOW TO APPLY :
Interested candidates, please submit your resume by clicking on “Apply Now” or aliceyap@hkmsvs.com
All applications will be treated in the strictest confidence and only shortlisted candidates will be notified
Yap Lay Choo
EA Licence No. 03C5391 | Registration No. R1987101

Our team of dedicated recruitment professionals serves a varied clientele from industiies such as Semi-conductors, Oil & Gas, Maritime, Supply Chain Management, Automotive, Aerospace, Pharmaceutical, Financial Institutions, Services, Government / Defence and IT.
